name: Channel Message Composer & Sender
description: Composes a professional channel message using Claude AI based on a topic and context, then posts it to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's Microsoft Teams channel messaging workflow.

source.originalName: Create, update and send a message to a channel in Microsoft Teams

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting messages

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the message

topic.description: Topic or subject for the channel message

context.description: Additional context, audience info, or tone instructions for the message

messageType.description: Type of message: announcement, update, reminder, question, or discussion

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for message composition
Run Claude AI to compose message
